summary: Both REQ-15 and REQ-16 appear to be implemented in the diff. AdminPage.tsx was updated to correctly handle authentication state, show loading spinners, display the payments table with all required columns, show the principal in the header with a Logout button, handle empty state, and return to the login gate on logout. useQueries.ts was updated to include the principal in the query key, enable the query only when authenticated and actor is ready, and use staleTime: 0 to ensure fresh data after login.
